description: Inter-island freight sensitivity classification for each basket item. Used to contextualize cross-county price differentials.

context.single_carrier: One regulated inter-island carrier controls nearly all food distribution
context.oahu_advantage: Goods land on Oahu first — minimal relative freight impact
context.local_production: Meadow Gold dairy produced on Oahu by Laulima Dairy

B.description: Moderate freight sensitivity — shelf-stable but heavy/bulky

freight_tracking_items.description: Items where the Honolulu-to-outer-island price spread directly measures freight cost impact

items.DAIRY-01: Meadow Gold whole milk — produced on Oahu, shipped inter-island
items.DAIRY-02: Meadow Gold 2% milk — same local production
items.DAIRY-08: Meadow Gold half & half — same local production
items.SNACK-03: Diamond Bakery arare — manufactured on Oahu
